completion_criteria_checked: schemas/project-state.schema.json gains a communication_prefs object property with additionalProperties:false and its own required fields: tone (enum: direct, balanced, chatty), language_level (enum: plain, mixed, technical), chattiness (enum: concise, balanced, verbose), and four boolean toggles (no_cheerleading, concise_by_default, explicit_uncertainty, separate_facts_from_inference). communication_prefs is added to the top-level required list so it is always present going forward.

.cockpit/state/project-state.json gains a communication_prefs object matching the schema, seeded with the owner's documented defaults: tone=direct, language_level=mixed, chattiness=concise, no_cheerleading=true, concise_by_default=true, explicit_uncertainty=true, separate_facts_from_inference=true.

scripts/generate-worker-directive.ps1 renders a 'Communication Defaults' section from project-state.json's communication_prefs, is guarded so the section is omitted rather than erroring when the field is absent, lists the seeded preferences, and ties the section to DECISION-009.

Functionally re-run independently: scripts/check-schemas.ps1 passes; scripts/generate-worker-directive.ps1 regenerates .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md with the Communication Defaults section and seeded values; scripts/validate-cockpit-state.ps1 passes; and an absent-field guard cycle (remove communication_prefs, regenerate, restore) exited cleanly and omitted the section when expected.
docs/DECISIONS.md records DECISION-076 for the capability, README.md notes the capability, and DECISION-009 is explicitly referenced as now fielded rather than merely recorded.

No evidence reviewed showed forbidden scope changes such as edits to other schemas or scripts, new log event types, routing-log writes, enforcement/gating behavior for communication_prefs, or changes to verdict/task-status/task-safety/Owner Review Matrix/Stop-Instead-of-Guess/Acceptance Boundary truth surfaces.
scripts/verify-handback-guardrails.ps1 was re-run independently by the verifier and completed cleanly for task_status returned_for_verification.
evidence_reviewed: git diff -- schemas/project-state.schema.json .cockpit/state/project-state.json scripts/generate-worker-directive.ps1 docs/DECISIONS.md README.md
Independent functional re-run of scripts/generate-worker-directive.ps1, including the absent communication_prefs guard path with restore
Select-String checks across README.md, docs/DECISIONS.md, .cockpit/state/project-state.json, and .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md
risks: communication_prefs is advisory-only worker guidance rendered into the directive; it does not enforce behavior. That is intentional and consistent with the task boundary.
summary: Independent verification found pcc-pathB-001 complete within its bounded scope. The project state and schema now carry the seeded communication defaults, the directive generator surfaces them for fresh worker sessions, the missing-field guard omits the section cleanly instead of erroring, the required docs updates are present, and the verifier's independent guardrail re-run completed cleanly.
